statement:
Four tasks have dependencies and durations. Two workers are available (Worker 1 and Worker 2). Each worker can handle one task at a time. Tasks cannot be split across workers.

Task A: 3 hours, no dependencies
Task B: 2 hours, no dependencies
Task C: 2 hours, depends on A (cannot start until A is complete)
Task D: 4 hours, depends on B (cannot start until B is complete)

All workers start at hour 0. Find a schedule that minimizes the total completion time (makespan). What is the earliest hour at which all tasks are done? Provide the full schedule.
correctAnswer: worker 1: task a (0-3), task c (3-5). worker 2: task b (0-2), task d (2-6). makespan: 6.
acceptableVariants: worker 1: b(0-2) d(2-6), worker 2: a(0-3) c(3-5), makespan=6
